# Command help documents config files and environment variables in Cobra's flags section.
exec mina help serve
stdout 'Serve the REST API'
stdout '--config-file'
stdout '--host'
stdout 'config: serve.host; env: MINA_HOST'
! stdout 'Precedence: defaults < config file < environment < CLI flags'

exec mina help migrate
stdout 'Apply database migrations'
stdout '--config-file'
stdout 'config: db; env: MINA_DB'
! stdout 'Precedence: defaults < config file < environment < CLI flags'

exec mina version --config-file missing.toml
stdout 'mina 0.0.0-dev'

# The local config file supplies shared command settings and serve settings.
mkdir cfg/mina
cp config.toml cfg/mina/config.toml
env XDG_CONFIG_PATH=$WORK/cfg
exec mina migrate
exists cfg-serve.db

! exec mina serve
stderr '192\.0\.2\.1:32001'

# --config-file overrides default config path discovery.
! exec mina --config-file override.toml serve
stderr '192\.0\.2\.4:32004'
exists override.db

# Missing explicit config files are ignored like missing default config files.
! exec mina --config-file missing.toml migrate
stderr 'migrate requires --db'

# Present config files are validated.
! exec mina --config-file invalid.toml migrate
stderr 'unsupported key unsupported'

# Environment values override the config file.
env MINA_DB=env-serve.db MINA_HOST=192.0.2.2 MINA_PORT=32002
! exec mina serve
stderr '192\.0\.2\.2:32002'
exists env-serve.db

# Invalid exchange-rate schedules are ignored while automatic loading is disabled.
! exec mina --config-file fx-invalid-disabled.toml serve --db fx-disabled.db --host 192.0.2.6 --port 32006 --yes
stderr '192\.0\.2\.6:32006'
exists fx-disabled.db

# Invalid exchange-rate schedules reject serve startup while automatic loading is enabled.
! exec mina --config-file fx-invalid-enabled.toml serve --db fx-enabled.db --host 192.0.2.7 --port 32007 --yes
stderr 'exchange-rate load schedule: cron schedule must have five fields'

# Unsupported startup providers reject serve startup.
! exec mina --config-file fx-invalid-startup-provider.toml serve --db fx-provider.db --host 192.0.2.8 --port 32008 --yes
stderr 'exchange-rate startup provider "typo" is not supported'

# The exchange-rate auto-load env var overrides only automatic loading.
env MINA_FX_AUTO_LOAD_ENABLED=false
! exec mina --config-file fx-auto-load-env.toml serve --db fx-env.db --host 192.0.2.5 --port 32005 --yes
stderr '192\.0\.2\.5:32005'
exists fx-env.db

# CLI flags override both environment values and the config file.
! exec mina serve --db cli-serve.db --host 192.0.2.3 --port 32003 --yes
stderr '192\.0\.2\.3:32003'
exists cli-serve.db

-- config.toml --
db = "cfg-serve.db"
yes = true

[serve]
host = "192.0.2.1"
port = 32001

-- override.toml --
db = "override.db"
yes = true

[serve]
host = "192.0.2.4"
port = 32004

-- invalid.toml --
unsupported = true

-- fx-auto-load-env.toml --
[exchange_rates]
automatic_loading_enabled = true
load_schedule_utc = "invalid"

-- fx-invalid-disabled.toml --
[exchange_rates]
automatic_loading_enabled = false
load_schedule_utc = "not a cron schedule"

-- fx-invalid-enabled.toml --
[exchange_rates]
automatic_loading_enabled = true
load_schedule_utc = "not a cron schedule"

-- fx-invalid-startup-provider.toml --
[exchange_rates]
startup_provider = "typo"
